aether.name: V&V Aether
aether.description: Our flagship electric hypercar. Pure racing adrenaline reimagined with silent, emission-free speed.

seo.title: Volt & Velocity Aether | 1900 HP Electric Hypercar
seo.description: Experience pure racing adrenaline with the V&V Aether. 1,900 HP, 0-60 MPH in 1.85 seconds, and a track-tuned aerodynamic carbon-fiber body.
seo.keywords: electric hypercar, performance EV, V&V Aether, electric sports car, fast EV

nexus.name: V&V Nexus
nexus.description: An executive lounge on wheels. Blending autonomous tech with biometric comfort configurations.

seo.title: Volt & Velocity Nexus | Premium Executive Electric Sedan
seo.description: Explore the V&V Nexus, a premium electric executive sedan. Designed for comfort, autonomy, and luxury with a 510-mile range and modern cockpit.
seo.keywords: electric sedan, luxury EV, executive electric car, V&V Nexus, autonomous sedan

zenith.name: V&V Zenith
zenith.description: Unparalleled off-road capability. Tri-motor torque vectoring ensures traction on any terrain.

seo.title: Volt & Velocity Zenith | Tri-Motor Offroad Electric SUV
seo.description: Discover the V&V Zenith, a high-performance luxury electric SUV with 1,020 HP and offroad capability. Built for mountain terrain and towing.
seo.keywords: electric SUV, offroad EV, tri-motor SUV, V&V Zenith, electric adventure car
